name: Black Bean & Greek Olive p t with Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dry black beans in 2 cups of water overnight, or combine them with 2 cups of water in a saucepan and bring to a boil for 2 minutes. Let stand for 1 hour.
2. Cook the beans in the soaking water over medium heat until very tender (about 1 hour). Drain and purée in a food processor, potato ricer, or coarse strainer.
3. In a skillet, heat olive oil and cook onion until golden. Add garlic and cook 1 minute.
4. Add mushrooms, cover, and cook 5 minutes. Uncover and cook until all liquid is absorbed.
5. Place walnuts in a blender or food processor and grind to the consistency of corn meal.
6. Remove pits from olives and chop finely.
7. Combine puréed beans, olive oil, onion mixture, garlic, mushrooms, walnuts, olives (without pits), thyme, and pepper in a blender or food processor. Blend until fairly smooth but not creamy.
8. Transfer to a serving dish and chill. Garnish with pimento slices and serve with Garlic and Herb Bread Chips or toast squares.
